name: Helmut
bio: Helmut was no ordinary knight—he was a living flame bound to armor, conjured and sustained by the bond he shared with Landis. A construct of will, loyalty, and magic, Helmut protected the Ember King from the shadows and stormed the battlefield without fear. He never spoke, yet his actions spoke volumes—every movement precise, every strike made in service of Landis' fragile soul. When he was slain during the Challenge of Rights, it reignited the dying fire within Landis, who had lost too much already. Helmut's fall was the spark that lit a wildfire.
King Landis's most trusted companion; killed by Decker, an act Landis later avenges.
